title: Tender Tantalizing Chiapan Chicken Stir-fry
description: A rich, shaggy midnight-craving Mexican dish featuring cherries and yuzu-cure, served as fajitas in a copper mug.
instructions: Marinate the chicken slices in yuzu zest, yuzu juice, salt, pepper, and minced garlic for 15 minutes.
Heat one tablespoon of oil in the copper mug over medium-high heat.
Add the marinated chicken to the mug and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Remove the cooked chicken and set aside on a plate.
In the same mug, add sliced bell pepper and onion; stir-fry for 3 minutes until vegetables are slightly softened.
Add cherries and stir to combine; cook for 2 minutes to slightly soften them.
Return chicken to the mug, toss everything together, and simmer for 1 minute to meld flavors.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
